# Kotlin language server test

# Start acme-lsp server
acme-lsp -headless -rootdir $WORK -workspaces $WORK -server '\.kt$:kotlin-lsp --stdio' &

# Format file
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.kt:'#0'
L -headless fmt
cmp hello.kt after-format.txt

# Definition of "HelloGreeter" from constructor call
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.kt:'#279'
L -headless def -p
stdout 'hello\.kt:.*:class HelloGreeter : Greeter \{'

# References to "HelloGreeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.kt:'#123'
L -headless refs
stdout 'hello\.kt:.*:class HelloGreeter : Greeter \{'
stdout 'hello\.kt:.*:    val g = HelloGreeter()'

# Type definition of "g"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.kt:'#293'
L -headless type -p
stdout 'hello.kt:.*:class HelloGreeter : Greeter \{'

# Signature of method call "hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.kt:'#301'
L -headless sig
stdout 'hello\(\): Unit'
stdout '/\*\* Hello prints a hello greeting \*/'

# Hover over the "hello" method call
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.kt:'#298'
L -headless hov
stdout 'Hello prints a hello greeting'
stdout 'override fun hello\(\)'

# Implementations of "Greeter" interface
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.kt:'#13'
L -headless impls
stdout 'hello\.kt:.*:class HelloGreeter : Greeter \{'

# Completion in the middle of method call "hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.kt:'#298'
L -headless comp
stdout 'hello'

# Print all symbols in the file
L -headless syms
stdout 'Greeter'
stdout 'HelloGreeter'
stdout 'hello'
stdout 'main'
stdout '/hello\.kt:'

# Query workspace symbols
L -headless wss HelloGreeter
stdout 'hello\.kt:.*:class HelloGreeter : Greeter \{'

# Rename HelloGreeter to WorldGreeter
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.kt:'#118'
L -headless rn WorldGreeter
cmp hello.kt after-rename.txt


-- hello.kt --
interface Greeter {
/** Hello prints a greeting */
fun hello( ) }

/** HelloGreeter greets with hello */
class HelloGreeter : Greeter {
/** Hello prints a hello greeting */
override fun hello( ) {
println("Hello, 世界") } }

fun main() {
val g = HelloGreeter()
g.hello( ) }
-- after-format.txt --
interface Greeter {
    /** Hello prints a greeting */
    fun hello()
}

/** HelloGreeter greets with hello */
class HelloGreeter : Greeter {
    /** Hello prints a hello greeting */
    override fun hello() {
        println("Hello, 世界")
    }
}

fun main() {
    val g = HelloGreeter()
    g.hello()
}
-- after-rename.txt --
interface Greeter {
    /** Hello prints a greeting */
    fun hello()
}

/** HelloGreeter greets with hello */
class WorldGreeter : Greeter {
    /** Hello prints a hello greeting */
    override fun hello() {
        println("Hello, 世界")
    }
}

fun main() {
    val g = WorldGreeter()
    g.hello()
}
